steps.title: Find the contrasting purposes in the notes
steps.content: Crab spiders use mimicry to ambush prey; katydids use it to hide from predators. The student's goal is to highlight this functional difference.

steps.title: Select the choice that shows this contrast
steps.content:
Choice C — Unlike crab spiders, which use mimicry to ambush prey, katydids use mimicry to hide from predators. explicitly contrasts the two animals' uses of mimicry: ambush versus hiding. The other options either do not address the functional difference or ignore the specific animals.

That matches Choice C — Unlike crab spiders, which use mimicry to ambush prey, katydids use mimicry to hide from predators..
